creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text: Hi Frank. Patch attached for the 3.0.x to 3.1.x update. The most significant change seemed to be https://github.com/theforeman/smart-proxy/commit/3d87c6feaa8caaf9b8c040f96061c3b8c33a39ef with the switch from wget to curl for downloads that landed before the 3.1 release candidates. This looked to be a low threat update otherwise.
